'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 51''' was the fifty-first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[December 18]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]]
*[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]
*[[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]] Characters
*[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] - [[Wampa/Legends|Wampa]] Ice Cave
*[[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa the Hutt's]] Droid - [[4/NG]]
*[[Ssi-ruu]]vi [[Entechment rig]]
*[[Laser cannon/Legends|Laser cannons]]
*[[Gasgano/Legends|Gasgano's]] [[Podracing/Legends|Podracer]]
